description: Tracks which bubble categories have been audited/expanded by agents, so future sessions know what's been reviewed and what still needs attention.

translation.notes: 5 language pairs x 5 tones = 25 leaves. Deep 3-level nesting. All spans have suggestions, diagnostic returns []. No changes needed.

structural_issues.issue: read category mixes source types and analysis modes
structural_issues.recommendation: Remove read-summary, read-keypoints, read-full; add read-contract, read-spreadsheet

structural_issues.issue: write-email is too broad for one of the most common AI use cases
build-website and build-app could benefit from sub-branches
structural_issues.recommendation: Split website into landing/portfolio/ecommerce; app into mobile/desktop/web
